raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output thoroughly engages the argument chain, identifying logical inconsistencies and proposing minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "The agent flags every load-bearing claim against corresponding evidence, demonstrating a thorough audit of the original draft.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing clear uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), with no scope drift or omission.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original draft and proposes revisions that avoid downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provides some annotation of sources and reasons, there are minor omissions in tracing non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.98,
    "RX.4": 0.92,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output thoroughly engages the argument chain, identifying logical inconsistencies and proposing minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: The agent flags every load-bearing claim against corresponding evidence, demonstrating a thorough audit of the original draft.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing clear uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), with no scope drift or omission.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original draft and proposes revisions that avoid downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides some annotation of sources and reasons, there are minor omissions in tracing non-cosmetic changes.
